label: professional_details
value: Works on an eco-friendly cleaning business and aims to prepare for business growth by developing scalable systems, networking, and continuous learning.

label: learning_interests
value: Interested in learning more about creative problem-solving techniques and innovation, looking to connect with online communities and forums such as r/innovation, r/creativity, r/designthinking, LinkedIn Groups like Innovation Management and Creative Problem Solvers, Facebook Groups like Innovation and Creativity, Design Thinking Community, Slack Channels like Design Thinking Slack Community, Innovation Slack Channel, Discourse Forums like Design Thinking Discourse, Innovation Forum, professional networks like IDEO U Community, InnoCentive, MindTools, Edison Nation, and websites like Fast Company, Forbes, and Harvard Business Review.

label: business_interests
value: Exploring networking and partnership opportunities in the eco-friendly cleaning industry using platforms like LinkedIn, Meetup, Facebook Groups, Twitter, GreenSeal, Green Cleaning Network (GCN), and The Green Business Bureau (GBB).

label: entertainment
value: Interested in notable figures and movements within modern philosophy that have influenced contemporary thought, particularly how these ideas have shaped current discussions on ethics and technology.

label: financial_advice
value: Considering allocating a recent bonus towards essential items or hobby-related purchases, such as subscriptions to project management tools (IBM Maximo, FTMaker, Asana, Monday.com), certifications (ISSA CIMS-GB, GSC, LEED AP), books on facility management, sustainability, and project management, advanced gardening equipment, greenhouse accessories, a chess set, art supplies, robo-advisor subscriptions (Betterment, Wealthfront), high-yield savings accounts, tech gadgets (smartwatch, fitness tracker, noise-canceling headphones), conference tickets, and mental health app subscriptions (Headspace, Calm).

label: volunteering_interests
value: Actively participates in volunteering at a local community center, leading workshops on sustainable living and green cleaning practices; interested in increasing involvement and connecting with more like-minded individuals through additional volunteer opportunities and groups.

label: gardening_experience
value: Interested in tips for vertical gardening, specifically for plants like tomatoes and cucumbers, including challenges related to support structures, water management, nutrient availability, and pest/disease management. Also interested in strategies for supporting growth such as using sturdy support structures, efficient irrigation, optimal soil and nutrients, pest and disease control, pruning and training, and managing sunlight and shade.

label: plans_and_intentions
value: Planning to integrate passion for art into professional life by organizing joint events, launching a blog, partnering with local businesses, and offering custom art services made from sustainable materials.

label: activity_and_service_preferences
value: Interested in integrating sustainable art materials and techniques into workshops to promote the eco-friendly cleaning business, such as using recycled paper, natural dyes, repurposed objects, biodegradable glues, and sustainable paints.

label: health_and_wellness_preferences
value: Continues to use mental health apps like Headspace or Calm to manage stress and improve mindfulness, and incorporates physical activities into the routine such as yoga, walking, or cycling.
